items.title: Why Salesforce Stock Dived by Nearly 21% in 2025
items.description: Many market players felt the company was guilty by (apparent) association with legacy technology.

items.title: Generali Opens Position in Archer Aviation Stock, Buys 1 Million Shares for $7 Million
items.description: Archer Aviation develops electric aircraft for urban air mobility, targeting city commuters and commercial partners with eVTOL technology.

items.title: ServiceNow stock falls despite earnings beat as CEO Bill McDermott tries to get investors to stop thinking of it as a SaaS company
items.description: The workflow automation giant posted strong earnings and announced an Anthropic partnership, as it tries to convince Wall Street it deserves an AI premium.

items.title: Salesforce (CRM) Wins $5.6 Billion U.S. Army Technology Contract
items.description: Salesforce, Inc. (NYSE:CRM) is one of the AI Stocks in Focus on Wall Street. On January 26, Salesforce announced that it has won a long-term US military technology contract. The US Army has awarded the company with a $5.6 billion, 10-year* Indefinite Delivery Indefinite Quantity (IDIQ) contract to modernize its operations. This landmark agreement will be […]

items.title: S&P 500 falls as Microsoft dives 11%, software stocks tumble: Live updates
items.description: "Magnificent Seven" companies Meta Platforms, Microsoft and Tesla posted earnings results after Wednesday's close.
